발문: 다음 글의 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
지문: High school is the best time to spark your curiosity and passion. You can explore, try new things, and learn more about yourself. The three years pass quickly, so use this time wisely to set yourself up for the future. Here are a few ways to do just that.
선지: ① To analyze the role of curiosity in learning.
② To describe the high school curriculum.
③ To suggest ways for high schoolers to prepare for the future.
④ To stress the importance of academic performance.
⑤ To compare different educational philosophies.
해설: 고등학교는 호기심과 열정을 불태우고, 탐험하고, 새로운 것을 시도하며, 자신에 대해 더 많이 배울 수 있는 최고의 시기이다. 이 3년은 빠르게 지나가므로, 미래를 위해 현명하게 이 시간을 사용해야 한다고 말하며, 이를 위한 몇 가지 방법을 제시하고 있다. 따라서 글의 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은 ③이다.

발문: 다음 글의 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
지문: These days, many teenagers spend too much time staring at smartphones and computer screens. Some even stay up late playing computer games and watching videos. This is fine as long as these devices enrich your life. However, excessive reliance on technology can exhaust your mental energy. To make it easier to focus on important things, set aside your devices for some time. For example, it's a good idea to finish surfing the Internet, watching videos, and sending instant messages during the week and turn everything off on the weekends. You can use your newly found time to connect with friends, family, and yourself. You might be surprised at how much more productive you can be when not glued to a screen.
선지: ① To analyze teenagers' technology usage patterns.
② To establish legal regulations for the use of electronic devices.
③ To introduce the latest features of electronic devices.
④ To explain various ways to enrich one's life.
⑤ To recommend balancing technology use for improved well-being.
해설: 이 글은 십대들의 과도한 기술 사용이 정신 에너지를 소모할 수 있음을 지적하며, 중요한 일에 집중하고 생산성을 높이기 위해 기기 사용 시간을 제한하고 균형 잡힌 기술 사용을 권고하는 내용이다. 즉, '향상된 행복을 위해 기술 사용의 균형을 맞출 것을 권고하려고' 하는 것이 글의 목적으로 가장 적절하다. 따라서 정답은 ⑤이다.

발문: 다음 글의 주장으로 가장 적절한 것은?
지문: These days, many teenagers spend too much time staring at smartphones and computer screens. Some even stay up late playing computer games and watching videos. This is fine as long as these devices enrich your life. However, excessive reliance on technology can exhaust your mental energy. To make it easier to focus on important things, set aside your devices for some time. For example, it's a good idea to finish surfing the Internet, watching videos, and sending instant messages during the week and turn everything off on the weekends. You can use your newly found time to connect with friends, family, and yourself. You might be surprised at how much more productive you can be when not glued to a screen.
선지: ① Teenagers should abandon technology for their well-being.
② Computer games are the main cause of poor grades.
③ Technology use should be limited to weekdays only.
④ Watching videos online is the worst use of time.
⑤ Set aside devices to avoid mental exhaustion from excessive technology.
해설: 요즘 십대들이 스마트폰과 컴퓨터 화면을 너무 많이 보며 정신적 에너지를 소모하고 있으므로, 중요한 일에 집중하기 위해 기기를 잠시 치워두고 주말에는 모든 것을 끄는 것이 좋다는 내용이다. 이를 통해 친구, 가족, 그리고 자신과 연결될 시간을 찾고 생산성을 높일 수 있다. 정답 선택지는 '과도한 기술 사용으로 인한 정신적 소모를 피하기 위해 기기를 치워두라.'이다. 따라서 필자가 주장하는 바로 가장 적절한 것은 ⑤이다.

발문: 다음 글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
지문: Who you are now says a lot about who you'll be in the future. However, as the years pass, some of your current interests and perspectives may fade. You could try sending a note to your future self. Writing a letter to your future self will allow you to take a moment to reflect on where you are, where you're heading, and what's important to you right now. Furthermore, when you're older, this letter can serve as a reminder of the person you used to be. It might even give you a new sense of strength to live a more meaningful life. The high school years can be overwhelming at times, but the challenge is there for a reason, and you don't have to be perfect every step of the way. During your high school days, have a great time trying out different things and discovering what works best for you. More importantly, however, don't forget to have fun along the way!
선지: ① How to overcome challenges during high school
② The benefits of writing a letter to your future self.
③ The importance of setting long-term life goals
④ Ways to preserve memories from your youth
⑤ The positive effects of journaling on personal growth
해설: 현재의 모습이 미래를 말해주지만 시간이 지나면 현재의 관심사와 관점은 희미해질 수 있으므로, 미래의 자신에게 편지를 써보는 것이 좋다는 내용이다. 미래의 자신에게 편지를 쓰는 것은 현재의 자신을 성찰하고, 나중에 과거의 자신을 상기시키며, 더 의미 있는 삶을 살 힘을 줄 수 있다는 이점을 설명한다. 또한 고등학교 시절의 어려움 속에서도 다양한 것을 시도하고 즐거운 시간을 보내는 것이 중요하다고 조언한다. 따라서 글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은 ②이다.

발문: 다음 글의 제목으로 가장 적절한 것은?
지문: Making time for exercise with a busy schedule is not easy. However, it's important to exercise regularly because it offers countless benefits. You can have more new experiences and complete more challenging tasks with increased energy. The benefits are not limited to physical strength; exercise also boosts confidence and fosters a positive attitude. Whether you like lifting weights at the gym, jogging through the park, or riding a bicycle, establishing and sticking to an exercise routine will strengthen your body, mind, and spirit.
선지: ① Fitting Exercise into a Busy Schedule
② The Physical Benefits of Regular Exercise
③ Choosing the Right Exercise for You
④ Strengthening Body, Mind, and Spirit with a Regular Exercise Routine
⑤ How Exercise Boosts Self-Confidence
해설: 이 글은 바쁜 일정 속에서도 규칙적인 운동을 하는 것이 중요하며, 운동이 신체적 강화를 넘어 새로운 경험을 위한 에너지 증가, 자신감 향상, 긍정적인 태도 함양 등 몸, 마음, 정신을 모두 강화하는 수많은 이점을 제공한다고 설명한다. 따라서 글의 제목으로 가장 적절한 것은 ④이다.

발문: 다음 글의 제목으로 가장 적절한 것은?
지문: Choosing your career path is one of the most important decisions you can make, and having a role model can be a powerful tool for making your dreams come true. Looking into the lives of the people you admire can be an inspiration in itself. Your role model can be someone you know personally, such as a teacher or family member, or someone you admire, such as a famous athlete or artist. If you pick someone in your social circle, you can directly ask for their guidance. If it is someone you can't meet in person, you can study their actions and observe their strategies. What you learn from them will benefit you both during and long after high school.
선지: ① The Importance of Mentorship in High School
② Learning from Famous Athletes and Artists
③ Personal vs. Public Figures as Role Models
④ The Power of Role Models in Career Guidance
⑤ A Guide to Choosing Your Career Path
해설: 진로 선택은 중요한 결정이며, 롤모델은 꿈을 이루는 데 강력한 도구가 될 수 있다. 롤모델은 개인적으로 아는 사람일 수도 있고, 유명인일 수도 있다. 롤모델에게 직접 조언을 구하거나 그들의 행동과 전략을 연구함으로써 배움을 얻을 수 있으며, 이는 고등학교 재학 중뿐만 아니라 그 이후에도 도움이 된다는 내용이다. 따라서 글의 제목으로 가장 적절한 것은 ④이다.

발문: 다음 글의 제목으로 가장 적절한 것은?
지문: Hello, I'm Luke Martin from Hampton, England, and I'm a proud member of the chess club. Chess is hugely popular here in Hampton. The matches are played every Friday after school. Since I learned chess in elementary school, it has been an important part of my life, and I want to help others discover its joys. Therefore, I'm planning to organize a chess competition this year. Good day, mates! My name is Emily, and I live in New South Wales, Australia. I enjoy surfing, and I do it as an extracurricular activity. We go to the beach to enjoy the beautiful ocean and perfect waves. I feel really lucky to live in this area and be a member of the surfing club. Hi, my name is Rajesh Singh from India, and I'm a member of the robotics club. With the other members of my club, I learn about all kinds of robots. We study everything necessary for making a robot: electronics, programming, problem-solving, and even design skills. Hi, I'm Yuto from Japan, and I'm a member of the baseball club. These days, I spend all my time after school preparing for the regional high school sports festival. This is a major sports event in Japan, so my friends and I are really looking forward to it! Hello, I'm Janice from the USA. I'm in the drama club. I enjoy standing in front of people and expressing a wide range of emotions, including delight, sadness, and many others. Plus, having an opportunity to be another person is totally special!
선지: ① A Comparison of International Student Hobbies
② The Benefits of Joining an After-School Club
③ An Introduction to the Hampton Chess Club
④ Robotics and Design Skills in Indian Schools
⑤ A Global Look at Various Student Club Activities
해설: 이 글은 영국, 호주, 인도, 일본, 미국 등 다양한 국가의 학생들이 각자의 방과 후 동아리 활동(체스, 서핑, 로봇 공학, 야구, 드라마)을 소개하는 내용이다. 각 학생은 동아리에서 하는 활동과 그 활동을 즐기는 이유를 설명한다. 따라서 글의 제목으로 가장 적절한 것은 '다양한 학생 동아리 활동에 대한 세계적인 시각'이다. 정답은 ⑤이다.

To make it easier what on important things, set aside your devices for some time. For example, it's a good idea to finish surfing the Internet, watching videos, and sending instant messages during the week and turn everything off on the weekends. You can use your newly found time to connect with friends, family, and yourself. You might be surprised at how much more productive you can be when not glued to a screen.

지문: Who you are now says a lot about who you'll be in the future. However, as the years pass, some of your current interests and perspectives may fade. You could try sending a note to your future self. Writing a letter to your future self will allow you to take a moment to reflect on where you are, where you're to head, and what's important to you right now. Furthermore, when you're older, this letter can serve as a reminder of the person you used to be. It might even give you a new sense of strength to live a more meaningful life. The high school years can be overwhelmed at times, but the challenge is there for a reason, and you don't have to be perfect every step of the way. During your high school days, have a great time to try out different things and discovering what works best for you. More importantly, however, don't forget to have fun along the way!

This is a major sports event in Japan, so my friends and I are really looking forward to it! Hello, I'm Janice from the USA. I'm in the drama club. I enjoy standing in front of people and to express a wide range of emotions, including delight, sadness, and many others. Plus, having an opportunity to be another person is totally special!

If you pick someone in your social circle, you can directly ask for their guidance. If it is someone you can't meet in person, you can study their actions and observe their strategies.
